tweets.text:
UNVETTED AFGHAN PEDOPHILE ARRESTED.

Basir Ahmad Safi, an Afghan national, was arrested by DHS on March 11. Safi has a disgusting criminal history, including indecent exposure to a minor, soliciting a child by computer, child abuse, and lascivious exhibition.

Safi was allowed into our homeland in 2021 as a part of President Biden’s "Operation Allies Welcome” and was arrested only two years later for his sex offenses.

He should have NEVER been allowed into America and given the opportunity to prey on innocent children. DHS will continue to identify and remove the public safety threats, like Safi, within our nation.

tweets.text:
ROOTING OUT FRAUD IN OUR ASYLUM SYSTEM. 

For too long, a fraudulent asylum claim has been an easy path to working in our nation, overwhelming our immigration system with meritless applications and allowing millions of illegal aliens and foreigners to flood our communities. 

Now, we’re taking decisive action to overhaul this failed system, strengthen the vetting of applicants, and ensure our asylum system prioritizes those actually seeking refuge from danger.

It’s part of our mission to end fraud in our immigration system and ensure our nation and our people are kept SAFE. 

https://t.co/snY8eL8M4i

tweets.text:
This is a win for the American people, the rule of law, and common sense.

For years, activist judges have used the federal judiciary to shield illegal aliens from deportations, simply because those illegal aliens could make false persecution claims—often from scripts provided from open-borders NGOs—even when the Board of Immigration Appeals ruled no such fears were credible. The Trump Administration will continue in its mission to deport illegal aliens and keep America safe.

tweets.text: The longer DHS goes without funding, the less time we have to prepare our nation for optimal safety and security at the FIFA World Cup and America’s 250th birthday. This Democrat shutdown impedes DHS’s ability to keep Americans safe.  Democrats must end this shutdown now and let DHS get back to our mission of protecting the Homeland.

tweets.text:
MS-13 MONSTER WHO MURDERED 5 ARRESTED. COOPERATION WORKS!

@USCIS and @ICEgov apprehended Edwin Antonio Hernandez-Hernandez, a criminal illegal alien from El Salvador. Hernandez confessed to membership in MS-13 and five savage murders in his home country — including the LIVE DISMEMBERMENT of one victim. 

Hernandez brazenly prayed on the generosity of the American people when he applied for asylum. The Biden administration DISREGARDED his vast criminal history, granted his request, and set a killer loose in our country because they claimed Hernandez required protection from torture in his home country — where Hernandez HIMSELF was the perpetrator of unspeakable torture and murder.

We are grateful that our brave law enforcement took this criminal off the streets, but Hernandez’s arrest occurred just two and a half weeks before Governor Spanberger signed an executive order that ended required cooperation of local and state law enforcement with ICE. Governor Spanberger’s actions protect monsters like Hernandez at the expense of Virginians’ public safety. Cooperation between local law enforcement and ICE is essential to getting violent criminals OUT of our communities.
